title: Login Authentication Error
description: User cannot login with valid credentials on the mobile app.

title: Payment Gateway Timeout
description: Transactions are failing due to API timeout in the checkout section.

title: UI Bug in Dashboard
description: Graph labels are overlapping in the analytics view on tablet devices.

title: Email Notification Delay
description: Customers are receiving password reset emails after 2 hours.

title: Database Connection Issue
description: Occasional 500 errors appearing during peak hours.

title: Search Filter Not Working
description: Category filters are not returning accurate results in the store.

title: New Ticket Request
description: Customer needs assistance in setting up a business profile.

title: Refund Status Inquiry
description: User has not received the refund amount after 7 days.

title: Image Upload Failure
description: Error occurs while uploading profile picture in PNG format.

title: Slow Page Loading
description: The product detail page takes more than 10 seconds to load.

title: Export Data Bug
description: CSV export is showing garbled characters for local language.

title: Mobile Responsive Issue
description: Footer section is broken on iPhone 13 Pro screens.
